selection_strategy: Representative rather than exhaustive. Entries were chosen to cover multiple kinds of libxml use across desktop software, server software, language bindings, CLI tools, documentation toolchains, and source-package build dependencies.
method: Identified candidate dependents from local Noble package metadata with apt-cache rdepends on libxml2, libxml2-dev, and libxml2-utils.
Validated direct dependency edges and package roles with apt-cache show or apt-cache showsrc.
Used upstream documentation when a package description did not make the XML-facing runtime feature explicit.

dependents.name: libvirt-daemon
dependents.runtime_functionality: Reads, validates, and emits the XML documents libvirt uses to define domains, networks, storage, snapshots, checkpoints, secrets, and related virtualization objects.

dependents.name: postgresql-16
dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides PostgreSQL's built-in XML type plus XML generation, XPath evaluation, XMLEXISTS/XMLTABLE processing, and table/schema/database-to-XML export functions.

dependents.name: php8.3-xml
dependents.runtime_functionality: Implements PHP's DOM, SimpleXML, XMLReader, XMLWriter, and XSL extensions.

dependents.name: python3-lxml
dependents.runtime_functionality: Exposes XML and HTML parsing, tree manipulation, XPath, and XSLT functionality to Python programs.

dependents.name: xmlstarlet
dependents.runtime_functionality: Transforms, queries, validates, edits, canonicalizes, and reformats XML documents from the shell.

dependents.name: mariadb-plugin-connect
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lets MariaDB's CONNECT storage engine work with external XML data sources alongside other file and remote-table formats.

dependents.name: cyrus-caldav
dependents.runtime_functionality: Implements the CalDAV and CardDAV portions of Cyrus, which rely on XML-based WebDAV request and response documents.

dependents.name: yelp
dependents.runtime_functionality: Displays GNOME help content in DocBook and Mallard XML formats.

dependents.name: libobt2v5
dependents.runtime_functionality: Loads and parses Openbox configuration and theme files for the Openbox desktop environment.

dependents.name: kdoctools5
dependents.runtime_functionality: Generates documentation in various output formats from DocBook XML sources.

dependents.name: yelp-tools
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds and checks Mallard and related help-document XML content for downstream software projects.

dependents.name: llvm-toolchain-18
dependents.notes: Included to represent source-package build-time use. The Noble source package Build-Depends on libxml2-dev.
